response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned generalist with 20+ years of experience and strong software craftsmanship values, but his primary expertise is firmly in TypeScript/Node.js and D language. Java appears only briefly (embedded/robotic tooling at Altom, C IDE work at National Instruments) and Kotlin is entirely absent. There is no demonstrated experience with the Spring ecosystem, Hibernate, Quarkus, JVM internals, or enterprise Java build tooling — all of which are table-stakes requirements for this role. His IDE-adjacent work (NI LabWindows/CVI) was for a C-based environment, not JVM tooling, and while he has built developer tools (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), these are in D, not the JVM ecosystem.
strengths: 20+ years of engineering experience with consistent emphasis on software craftsmanship, TDD, and clean architecture across diverse environments
Demonstrated interest in developer tooling and IDE-adjacent work (NI LabWindows/CVI, Fluent-Asserts test library, Trial test runner, MCP code generators)
Experience with high-performance, large-scale systems handling millions of requests per second at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby
concerns: No meaningful Java or Kotlin expertise — Java appears only in peripheral contexts and Kotlin is not mentioned anywhere in the resume
Zero evidence of Spring, Hibernate, Quarkus, or any Java enterprise framework experience, which are core technical focus areas for this role
No JVM tooling experience (no IntelliJ plugin development, LSP/language server work, Gradle/Maven plugin authorship, or application server integration)

key_factors.factor: No Spring or enterprise Java framework experience
